nav.solutionsDesc: Strategic capability areas engaged by ministries, commands, and enterprises.
nav.industriesDesc: Sector-specific protocol and service transformation programs.

footer.tagline: The House of Etiquette, Hospitality & Protocol. Developing Saudi Arabia's next generation of service leaders through global standards and Saudi values, in alignment with Vision 2030.
footer.address: King Fahd Road, Olaya District, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

cta.defaultTitle: Engage the institution that sets the standard
cta.defaultBody: Whether you represent a ministry, a command, an authority, or an enterprise, our advisors will design an engagement around your mandate.

hero.heading: Developing Saudi Arabia's Next Generation of Service Leaders
hero.body: Global standards. Saudi values. Exceptional service. An executive institution shaping how the Kingdom is represented — in government, defense, hospitality, and on the world stage.

solutions.title: Capabilities, not courses
solutions.intro: EHP partners with institutions to elevate how they serve, represent, and lead. Each engagement is a strategic capability area, delivered with the rigor of executive education.

protocol.title: Protocol in Practice
protocol.intro: Excellence is not a single moment — it is a continuum. Follow a VIP engagement through six defining stages, and see how protocol shapes every interaction.

stages.label: Arrival
stages.title: The first impression is formed before a word is spoken
stages.body: From the choreography of the welcome line to the placement of the host, arrival sets the tone of the entire engagement. Precision in greeting order, escort etiquette, and spatial awareness signals respect and readiness.

stages.label: Greeting
stages.title: Warmth governed by form
stages.body: Saudi generosity meets international protocol. Titles, precedence, and cultural courtesies are observed instinctively, making every guest feel both honored and at ease.

stages.label: Meeting
stages.title: Composure that commands the room
stages.body: Seating hierarchy, attentive listening, and disciplined timing turn a meeting into a demonstration of institutional excellence. Every gesture reinforces credibility.

stages.label: Dining
stages.title: The table as a stage for diplomacy
stages.body: From cover settings to service sequence and conversational grace, formal dining is where relationships deepen. We train teams to make the complex appear effortless.

stages.label: Ceremony
stages.title: Moments of national significance
stages.body: Honors, signings, and state observances demand flawless sequencing. Our protocol officers rehearse the dignified pace that defines memorable ceremonies.

stages.label: Departure
stages.title: A lasting impression, gracefully sealed
stages.body: The farewell is as deliberate as the welcome. Escort, acknowledgement, and follow-through ensure the guest leaves with the institution's excellence top of mind.

pillars.label: Roots
pillars.title: Cultural Foundation
pillars.body: Rooted in Saudi generosity, honor, and respect — the cultural foundation of authentic service.

pillars.label: Rigor
pillars.title: Global Standards
pillars.body: Benchmarked against the world's finest institutions for protocol, hospitality, and executive conduct.

pillars.label: Reputation
pillars.title: Lasting Legacy
pillars.body: Trust compounded over time becomes reputation — the hallmark of a leading institution.

vision.title: Excellence in service is a national imperative
vision.body: As the Kingdom opens to the world, the quality of how Saudi Arabia welcomes, hosts, and represents itself becomes a strategic asset. EHP Academy exists to ensure that asset is developed to its highest potential.

industries.title: Every sector. One standard.
industries.intro: From ministries to luxury hotels, every institution can achieve distinction in service and protocol.

partners.body: EHP collaborates with leading international hospitality, protocol, and certification bodies to deliver globally benchmarked standards.

meta.title: About EHP Academy
meta.description: The story, vision, mission, and leadership philosophy of EHP Academy — the House of Etiquette, Hospitality & Protocol, advancing Saudi service excellence in alignment with Vision 2030.

hero.title: An institution built to elevate how Saudi Arabia serves and leads
hero.intro: EHP Academy is not a course marketplace. We are a house of excellence — developing the conduct, hospitality, and protocol competency that defines world-class representation.

story.title: Founded to professionalize service at a national level
story.p1: EHP Academy was established with a singular conviction: that the way a nation welcomes, hosts, and represents itself is a strategic asset. As Saudi Arabia opens to the world, the demand for refined, consistent, and culturally rooted service excellence has never been greater.
story.p2: We bring together the discipline of diplomatic protocol, the warmth of Saudi hospitality, and the rigor of executive education. Our work spans ministries, military commands, airports, hospitals, and Fortune 500 enterprises — each engagement designed around the institution it serves.
story.p3: The result is a generation of Saudi professionals who carry themselves, and the Kingdom, with quiet confidence on any stage.

vision.text: To be the defining institution for service, hospitality, and protocol excellence in the Kingdom and the region.

mission.text: To develop Saudi professionals whose conduct meets global standards while honoring Saudi values — in every interaction, at every level.

items.title: Honor
items.body: We treat every interaction as a representation of the Kingdom's dignity and reputation.

items.title: Generosity
items.body: Authentic Saudi hospitality is the heart of everything we teach and practice.

items.title: Precision
items.body: Protocol is exact. We pursue flawless execution in every detail and sequence.

items.title: Discretion
items.body: We operate with the confidentiality and composure expected at the highest levels.

items.title: Excellence
items.body: We benchmark against the finest institutions in the world — and aim higher.

items.title: Stewardship
items.body: We build lasting national capability, not short-term training outcomes.

timeline.title: A measured path to becoming an institution

items.title: Founding vision
items.body: EHP is established to professionalize service, hospitality, and protocol across Saudi institutions.

items.title: International alignment
items.body: Partnerships formed with global hospitality and protocol bodies to benchmark standards.

items.title: Government & defense mandate
items.body: Programs expand to ministries, authorities, and military commands at national scale.

items.title: Vision 2030 acceleration
items.body: EHP becomes a recognized partner in the Kingdom's human-capability ambitions.

items.title: The institution
items.body: A respected house of excellence shaping how Saudi Arabia is represented to the world.

leadership.quote: We believe excellence is taught by example, sustained by culture, and proven in the moments that matter most.
leadership.body: Our faculty are practitioners — protocol officers, hospitality leaders, and diplomats who have operated at the highest levels. They teach not theory, but mastery earned in service to nations and institutions.

meta.title: Solutions
meta.description: EHP Academy solutions: Government Excellence, Military Protocol, Executive Presence, Customer Experience, Hospitality Excellence, Corporate Service Culture, and International Protocol.

hero.title: Strategic capabilities for institutions that represent the Kingdom
hero.intro: We engage with ministries, commands, authorities, and enterprises as a partner in excellence — not a vendor of courses. Each solution is a capability area, tailored to your mandate.

items.title: Government Excellence
items.summary: Elevating the service standards of ministries, authorities, and public-facing institutions to match the expectations of citizens and global partners.
items.outcome: Consistent, dignified public service that reinforces institutional trust.

items.title: Military Protocol
items.summary: Ceremonial precision and command-level conduct for defense institutions, honor formations, and official military engagements.
items.outcome: Flawless ceremonial execution worthy of national significance.

items.title: Executive Presence
items.summary: Developing the gravitas, composure, and bearing that define credible leadership in high-stakes environments.
items.outcome: Leaders who command respect and represent with confidence.

items.title: Customer Experience
items.summary: Designing memorable, dignified service journeys that turn every touchpoint into an expression of excellence.
capabilities: Journey mapping and moments of truth
items.outcome: Service experiences that build loyalty and reputation.

items.title: Hospitality Excellence
items.summary: World-class hospitality standards rooted in the warmth and generosity of authentic Saudi tradition.
items.outcome: Hospitality that distinguishes the institution and the Kingdom.

items.title: Corporate Service Culture
items.summary: Embedding a sustainable culture of service excellence across every level of an organization.
items.outcome: A self-sustaining culture where excellence becomes the norm.

items.title: International Protocol
items.summary: Diplomatic conduct and cross-border etiquette for engagements on the global stage.
items.outcome: Confident, correct conduct in any international setting.

meta.title: Industries
meta.description: EHP Academy serves government, defense, hospitality, tourism, airports, aviation, healthcare, education, financial services, and luxury retail with sector-specific protocol and service excellence.

hero.title: Tailored to the realities of every sector we serve
hero.intro: Protocol and service excellence look different in a ministry, an airport, and a hospital. Explore how EHP adapts to the challenges of each sector.

industries.sectionTitle: Select a sector to explore the engagement
industries.sectionIntro: Each sector presents distinct challenges. Our approach is always tailored — here is how the work translates across industries.

items.label: Government
items.challenge: Public institutions face rising citizen expectations and high-profile official engagements that demand consistency.
items.solution: We standardize reception protocol, citizen experience, and official conduct across departments.
items.outcome: Trusted, dignified public service that strengthens institutional credibility.

items.label: Defense
items.challenge: Ceremonial occasions and visiting delegations require absolute precision and command-level discipline.
items.solution: Military protocol programs covering honors, precedence, and ceremonial sequencing.
items.outcome: Flawless ceremonies that honor national significance.

items.label: Hospitality
items.challenge: Luxury properties must deliver globally benchmarked service while expressing authentic Saudi warmth.
items.solution: Five-star service standards blended with cultural hosting traditions.
items.outcome: Distinctive hospitality that earns loyalty and reputation.

items.label: Tourism
items.challenge: A fast-growing sector needs a service workforce ready to represent the Kingdom to the world.
items.solution: Scalable service-culture and guest-experience programs for destinations and operators.
items.outcome: Memorable visitor experiences that build destination equity.

items.label: Airports
items.challenge: High-volume environments must balance efficiency with VIP and protocol handling.
items.solution: Passenger experience design and VIP/protocol lounge service standards.
items.outcome: Seamless journeys with elevated treatment where it matters.

items.label: Aviation
items.challenge: Cabin and ground teams represent the brand at every altitude and touchpoint.
items.solution: In-flight service excellence and premium-cabin etiquette programs.
items.outcome: A signature onboard experience worthy of the national carrier.

items.label: Healthcare
items.challenge: Patient dignity and compassionate communication are as vital as clinical care.
items.outcome: Care environments where patients feel respected and reassured.

items.label: Education
items.challenge: Institutions shape future leaders and must model professional conduct.
items.solution: Etiquette, presence, and service-leadership curricula for faculty and students.
items.outcome: Graduates who carry themselves with confidence and grace.

items.label: Financial Services
items.challenge: Client trust is built on discretion, composure, and impeccable conduct.
items.solution: Executive presence and high-net-worth client relationship etiquette.
items.outcome: Advisor relationships defined by trust and professionalism.

items.label: Luxury Retail
items.challenge: Discerning clients expect a service ritual that matches the brand promise.
items.solution: Clienteling, VIP service, and luxury-floor etiquette programs.
items.outcome: Boutique experiences that convert clients into patrons.

meta.title: Programmes
meta.description: EHP Academy programmes in diplomatic protocol, executive presence, military ceremonial, hospitality excellence, government service excellence, and customer experience design.

hero.title: A premium curriculum for every level and every institution
hero.intro: From one-day intensives to multi-day residential certifications, every EHP programme is designed with the rigour of executive education and the precision of institutional protocol.

programs.catalogTitle: Select a programme to explore the curriculum
programs.catalogIntro: Filter by level, category, or format. Every programme can be delivered on-site at your institution, customised to your context, and combined into a bespoke development pathway.

modes.desc: Delivered at your institution by EHP faculty — fully customised to your environment, culture, and team.
Immersive multi-day programmes at our Riyadh facility, combining deep learning with peer interaction.
Focused half-day or full-day interventions targeting a specific skill, behaviour, or capability area.
A fully custom programme sequence designed around your organisation's mandate, culture, and ambition.

programs.ctaTitle: Build a custom development pathway for your institution
programs.ctaBody: Our advisors will combine the right programmes into a coherent, sustained journey — aligned with your objectives and your people.

meta.title: Faculty & Experts
meta.description: EHP Academy faculty are practising protocol officers, diplomatic advisors, and hospitality leaders who have operated at the highest levels of government, defense, and international service.

hero.title: Practitioners who have operated at the highest levels
hero.intro: Every EHP faculty member has served in the field — as a protocol officer, diplomat, military commander, or hospitality director. They teach mastery earned in practice, not theory.

faculty.philosophyTitle: Excellence is taught only by those who have lived it
faculty.philosophyP1: At EHP, we do not appoint academics to teach protocol. We engage the people who have managed state visits, commanded ceremonial formations, and hosted royalty — the professionals for whom excellence was not a concept but a daily operational requirement.
faculty.philosophyP2: Our faculty bring decades of real-world authority to every programme. They teach with the quiet confidence of those who have performed flawlessly in the moments that define institutions.
faculty.philosophyP3: Every engagement is personally supervised by a senior faculty member who has practised at the level our participants aspire to reach.
faculty.disciplinesTitle: Collective expertise across every dimension of service excellence
faculty.ctaTitle: Engage our faculty for your institution
faculty.ctaBody: All EHP programmes are designed and delivered by senior practitioners. Speak to our advisory team about the right faculty for your engagement.

meta.title: Partnerships
meta.description: EHP Academy partners with leading international hospitality schools, protocol bodies, and certification institutes to deliver globally benchmarked standards in Saudi Arabia.

hero.title: Global standards, delivered through trusted institutional alliances
hero.intro: EHP does not operate in isolation. We build enduring partnerships with the world's leading institutions in hospitality, protocol, and executive education to ensure our programmes carry international authority.

partnerships.whyP1: Saudi Arabia's ambition is global. The institutions and professionals we develop will be measured against international standards — by foreign heads of state, international partners, and global guests. Our responsibility is to ensure those standards are embedded in every programme we deliver.
partnerships.whyP2: Our partnerships are carefully curated to bring the world's most credible hospitality, protocol, and executive education institutions into collaborative relationship with EHP. Every alliance is chosen for its direct relevance to the Saudi context and Vision 2030 ambitions.
partnerships.whyP3: We do not collect logos. We build working partnerships that enrich our curriculum, validate our faculty, and strengthen the credentials of every participant we develop.
partnerships.inquiryTitle: Interested in a strategic alliance with EHP?
partnerships.inquiryBody: We welcome conversations with international institutions whose expertise aligns with our mission. All partnership discussions begin with a confidential conversation.
partnerships.ctaBody: Whether you are a government authority, a hospitality group, or an international institution, there may be a meaningful role for partnership with EHP Academy.

meta.title: Case Studies
meta.description: EHP Academy case studies documenting institutional transformation in protocol, hospitality excellence, executive presence, and government service — across Saudi ministries, defense, and hospitality.

hero.title: Transformation documented with the rigour of institutional evidence
hero.intro: These are not testimonials. They are documented accounts of how EHP engaged with an institution, diagnosed its challenges, designed a strategy, and delivered measurable transformation.

caseStudies.listingTitle: Select a case to read the full account
caseStudies.listingIntro: All case studies are presented with the institution's authorization. Client names are anonymized where confidentiality was requested.
caseStudies.ctaTitle: Become the institution your partners expect you to be
caseStudies.ctaBody: Every one of these engagements began with a conversation. Let us understand your challenge and design the right response.

meta.title: Insights
meta.description: Thought leadership from EHP Academy on protocol, hospitality excellence, executive presence, and service leadership.

hero.title: Thought leadership on service, protocol, and institutional excellence
hero.intro: EHP faculty and advisors publish perspectives on the disciplines that define how organisations represent themselves — drawing on decades of practice at the highest levels.

insights.availablePrint: Available in print — Request a copy via consultation
insights.briefingBody: Senior leaders engaged with EHP receive our quarterly Intelligence Briefing — in-depth perspectives on protocol, service excellence, and institutional representation. Available exclusively to consultation enquirers and programme alumni.
insights.ctaTitle: Engage the institution that thinks deeply about excellence
insights.ctaBody: These perspectives emerge from practice, not research alone. Speak to our advisors about how they apply to your institution.

meta.title: Request a Consultation
meta.description: Engage EHP Academy to develop protocol, etiquette, hospitality, and service excellence capabilities for your institution. Contact our advisory team in Riyadh.

hero.title: Begin a conversation about your institution's excellence
hero.intro: Our advisory team works exclusively with institutions — not individuals seeking personal enrichment. Tell us about your mandate and we will design the right engagement.

contact.howTitle: The right conversation starts with clarity
contact.howIntro: EHP engagements take four forms. Understanding your need allows us to bring the right advisors to the conversation from the first meeting.

enquiryTypes.label: Institutional Partnership
enquiryTypes.body: For ministries, commands, and large authorities seeking a strategic development mandate.

enquiryTypes.label: Programme Enquiry
enquiryTypes.body: For specific programme delivery — on-site, residential, or bespoke pathway.

enquiryTypes.label: Executive Coaching
enquiryTypes.body: For individual senior leaders seeking protocol and executive presence development.

enquiryTypes.label: Event Protocol
enquiryTypes.body: For ceremonies, state visits, summits, and formal events requiring protocol support.

contact.formIntro: All enquiries are handled in strict confidence by a senior EHP advisor. We typically respond within one business day.
contact.discretionBody: All institutional enquiries and engagement details are held in strict confidence. EHP does not publish client names without explicit authorization.

form.title: Title / Role
form.message: Tell us about your institution and what you're looking to achieve
